releaseNotes:
fix: T Sports revert + VPS HLS proxy for geo-locked channels

- Revert T Sports streamUrl to the v1.1 mhdtvsport.site wrapper.
  Direct Akamai URLs returned 200 for master.m3u8 but 404 for
  the variant playlists due to Akamai's per-session/per-IP
  affinity — wrapper mediates that for us.
- Add CazéTV (Brazil-only YouTube live) to World Cup tab.
- Add a generic VPS HLS proxy in feed-server.py:
    /yt/<slug>/master.m3u8       resolves + rewrites manifest
    /yt/seg?c=<cc>&u=<b64>       proxies each segment via Decodo
                                 of country <cc>, optionally adds
                                 Referer if the channel is in
                                 HLS_REFERER_CHANNELS.
  Supports two source types: YouTube live (yt-dlp resolved) and
  fixed Akamai/HLS URLs requiring Referer.
- Trim live DVR window to 30 segments so 5MB YT playlists become
  ~49KB — ExoPlayer no longer times out parsing them.
- yt-dlp now picks <=720p variant for CazéTV so the BR proxy hop
  can sustain segment bandwidth.
